song_name: I Like The Way You Kiss Me
tuning: E A D G B E

pro_brother.song_name: I Like The Way You Kiss Me

content:
[Intro]
N.C.
I like the way you kiss me
N.C.
I like the way you—, uh

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]
  I like the way you kiss me, I can tell you miss me[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Bm[/ch]
I can tell it hits, hits, hits, hits[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]                            [ch]G[/ch]
  Not tryna be romantic, I'll hit it from the back[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Bm[/ch]
Just so you don't get attached (Attached, attached, attached)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]
  I like the way you kiss me, I can tell you miss me[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Bm[/ch]
I can tell it hits, hits, hits, hits[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]                            [ch]G[/ch]
  Not tryna be romantic, I'll hit it from the back[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Bm[/ch]
Just so you don't get attached (Attached, attached, attached)[/tab]

[Verse 1]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]
You bite my lip, just for the taste[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]Bm[/ch]
You're on your knees, I'm on the case[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]
You take the heat, and with such grace[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]                            [ch]Bm[/ch]
You say we'rе done, but here you stay[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab]                                     [ch]Em[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]
You said you'rе scared, I'll let you down (I'll let you down)[/tab]
[tab]                                  [ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]B[/ch]
Just stick around and you'll find out (And you'll find out)[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]Em[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]
But don't you wanna make me proud? (So make me proud)[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]B[/ch]
'Cause I'm so proud, Babe I'm so proud of you[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]
  I like the way you kiss me, I can tell you miss me[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Bm[/ch]
I can tell it hits, hits, hits, hits[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]                            [ch]G[/ch]
  Not tryna be romantic, I'll hit it from the back[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Bm[/ch]
Just so you don't get attached (Attached, attached, attached)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]
  I like the way you kiss me, I can tell you miss me[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Bm[/ch]
I can tell it hits, hits, hits, hits[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]                            [ch]G[/ch]
  Not tryna be romantic, I'll hit it from the back[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Bm[/ch]
Just so you don't get attached (Attached, attached, attached)[/tab]


[Verse 3]
[tab]                [ch]Em[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]
Do I stress you out? Can I help you out?[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]Bm[/ch]
Does it turn you on when I turn you ‘round?[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Em[/ch]                            [ch]C[/ch]
Can we make a scene? (Scene) Can we make it loud? (Loud)[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]Bm[/ch]
'Cause I'm so proud, baby, I'm so proud of you[/tab]

[Break]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch]
     So proud of you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch]
     Hm, I'm so proud of you[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]
  I like the way you kiss me, I can tell you miss me[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Bm[/ch]
I can tell it hits, hits, hits, hits[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]                            [ch]G[/ch]
  Not tryna be romantic, I'll hit it from the back[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Bm[/ch]
Just so you don't get attached (Attached, attached, attached)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]
  I like the way you kiss me, I can tell you miss me[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Bm[/ch]
I can tell it hits, hits, hits, hits[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]                            [ch]G[/ch]
  Not tryna be romantic, I'll hit it from the back[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Bm[/ch]
Just so you don't get attached (Attached, attached, attached)[/tab]


[Outro]
N.C.
I like the way you kiss me
N.C.
I like the way you—, uh
